&Schema = !'dbo' &DatabaseName = !'BASE_ROLIVEIRA' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'Default',!'DuplicatasRenegociacao', &ServerName, &DatabaseName, &Schema) &AuditSchema = !'auditplus' &AuditDatabaseName = !'BASE_ERPAUDIT' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'AuditPlus',!'AuditRecord', &AuditServerName, &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema)
Do Case Case &operation = !'DRP' Do 'Drop' Case &operation = !'INS' Do 'Insert' Case &operation = !'UPD' Do 'Update' Case &operation = !'DLT' Do 'Delete' EndCase
Sub 'Drop' &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasRenegociacaoInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasRenegociacaoUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasRenegociacaoDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine()
EndSub
